Content: # Metronome > [!IMPORTANT] > This app is superseded by [https://codeberg.org/thetwom/metronome](https://codeberg.org/thetwom/metronome) Simple metronome app. [](https://f-droid.org/packages/de.moekadu.metronome/) [](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=de.moekadu.metronome) | ![screenshot-0](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/00.png) | ![screenshot-1](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/01.png) | ![screenshot-2](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/02.png) | ![screenshot-3](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/03.png) | ![screenshot-4](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/04.png) | |-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------| # Functionality This app provides basic functionality like: * Setting speed manually or by "tap in" * If you use "tap in" while the metronome is running, the klicks should lock in to your taps. * Choose different sounds and individually adapt the volume * Save and load your current settings * Choose between light and dark theme * Show a notification, which supports "start" and "stop" # Help me improving the app If you like this app, but have ideas for improvement or are annoyed by some behaviour, please let me know. **License:** [GPLv3](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0)
Translation: # Metrónomo > [!IMPORTANTE] > Esta aplicación ha sido reemplazada por [https://codeberg.org/thetwom/metronome](https://codeberg.org/thetwom/metronome) Aplicación simple de metrónomo. [](https://f-droid.org/packages/de.moekadu.metronome/) [](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=de.moekadu.metronome) | ![captura-0](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/00.png) | ![captura-1](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/01.png) | ![captura-2](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/02.png) | ![captura-3](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/03.png) | ![captura-4](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/04.png) | |-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------| # Funcionalidad Esta aplicación ofrece funcionalidades básicas como: * Ajustar la velocidad manualmente o mediante "tocar" * Si usas "tocar" mientras el metrónomo está funcionando, los clics deberían sincronizarse con tus toques. * Elegir diferentes sonidos y adaptar individualmente el volumen * Guardar y cargar tus configuraciones actuales * Elegir entre tema claro y oscuro * Mostrar una notificación, que soporta "iniciar" y "detener" # Ayúdame a mejorar la aplicación Si te gusta esta aplicación, pero tienes ideas para mejorarla o te molesta algún comportamiento, por favor házmelo saber. **Licencia:** [GPLv3](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0)

RowTranslations.translatedContent: > Esta aplicación ha sido reemplazada por [https://codeberg.org/thetwom/metronome](https://codeberg.org/thetwom/metronome)

RowTranslations.originContent: This app provides basic functionality like:
RowTranslations.translatedContent: Esta aplicación ofrece funcionalidades básicas como:

RowTranslations.originContent: * Setting speed manually or by "tap in"
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * Ajustar la velocidad manualmente o mediante "tocar"

RowTranslations.originContent: * If you use "tap in" while the metronome is running, the klicks should lock in to your taps.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * Si usas "tocar" mientras el metrónomo está funcionando, los clics deberían sincronizarse con tus toques.

RowTranslations.originContent: * Choose different sounds and individually adapt the volume
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * Elegir diferentes sonidos y adaptar individualmente el volumen

RowTranslations.originContent: * Save and load your current settings
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * Guardar y cargar tus configuraciones actuales

RowTranslations.originContent: * Choose between light and dark theme
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * Elegir entre tema claro y oscuro

RowTranslations.originContent: * Show a notification, which supports "start" and "stop"
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * Mostrar una notificación, que soporta "iniciar" y "detener"

RowTranslations.originContent: If you like this app, but have ideas for improvement or are annoyed by some behaviour, please let me know.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: Si te gusta esta aplicación, pero tienes ideas para mejorarla o te molesta algún comportamiento, por favor házmelo saber.
